'''''[https://www.rootersports.com/ Rooter]''''' in association with '''''[https://wingslifestyle.in/products/phantom/ Wings Phantom]''''' present a BGMI invitational tournament called the ''' Rooter Pro Scrims  ''' with a prize pool of ₹2,85,000 {{Abbr/INR}} . The ''Conqueror Phase'' feature a prize pool of ₹1,65,000 {{Abbr/INR}}

==About==

===Format===
''''' Rooter Pro Scrims: Conqueror Phase:''' 25th August 2021 to 27th August 2021.''

Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]], and [[Sanhok]]

* '' A total of 20 teams will play in the Conqueror Phase''
* ''Top 17 teams qualified from the ([https://liquipedia.net/pubg/Rooter_Pro_Scrims/Initial_Phase/ Initial Phase] + 3 Fan Favourite Teams ).''
* ''9 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days 
* ''Each team will play a total of 9 matches to decide the winner''.
